creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Unluckily I have no clue right away about what could be causing this. These are difficult things to debug.

The very simple setup I use here has asterisk running in a jail with pjsip and it works fine, so I can't reproduce the issue you describe.

First thing I notice is that asterisk 18.9.0 is an older version, could you try with the latest one? (18.10.1) Most probably this will make no difference but it's worth a test.

To debug this some configuration details would be very useful. Ideally you should create a minimal configuration showing the issue. Also While I maintain the port updated I'm not an asterisk developer and don't know its internals too well.

You should really file a bug report upstream with the details on how to reproduce the issue. Upstream developers could understand the issue better than me.

You could try creating another clean jail with asterisk and make a basic install/configuration of asterisk and see if the issue also appears, and then add to that configuration until the issue appears.
